message:
refactor(ufunc): route array construction through typed storage bridge

Introduce from_values_with_dtype() and from_values_with_dtype_lossy()
helper methods on UFuncArray that funnel all array construction through
the typed storage casting pipeline (from_storage_with_dtype). Previously,
factory methods like zeros(), ones(), linspace(), arange(), etc. directly
constructed Self { shape, values, dtype } which bypassed dtype-aware
storage validation entirely. Now every construction path ensures the
internal f64 values are cast-checked against the declared DType.

- from_values_with_dtype() returns Result for fallible contexts
- from_values_with_dtype_lossy() falls back to raw construction for
  infallible APIs (scalar, zeros_like, fromiter, etc.)
- Added tests verifying Bool/I64 dtype arrays survive the storage
  round-trip (zeros, linspace, elementwise binary/unary)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
